description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a symmetrical facade, featuring a prominent front porch supported by columns and surrounded by manicured lawns and flowering trees. The exterior is finished in a light gray color with white trim, and the windows are arranged in neat, vertical rows, giving the house a stately appearance. The property includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, wooden deck, and several outdoor seating areas, as well as a driveway with parked cars at the front. The roof is primarily gabled, with multiple dormers and a flat section visible on top. The landscaping is lush, with green grass, ornamental shrubs, and mature trees providing shade and privacy. The overall design blends traditional Colonial elements with modern amenities, making it suitable for a high-end residential neighborhood.
description: A large, elegant two-story house with a gabled roof, symmetrical windows, a columned front porch, and landscaped gardens with a pool and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, columned porch, driveway with two cars, and flowering trees flanking the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall, vertical windows, extended porch, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and deck area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, wooden deck, outdoor seating, and garden features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, additional garden space, and the full length of the house with its symmetrical window arrangement.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch supported by columns, and decorative landscaping.
